sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96870" key="sti/xinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στῐ´χ-ῐνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of lines</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">verses</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ς. θάνατος</foreign> of one <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who was rhymed to death,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.135</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
